enriched_points.expanded_content: Innovative IoT sensors enable continuous tracking of drainage flow and rainfall, facilitating immediate data analysis for improved flood management and urban infrastructure resilience.
Advanced predictive modeling techniques utilize historical data and machine learning to forecast drainage behavior, helping urban planners anticipate and mitigate flooding events effectively.
Integrating green infrastructure, like permeable pavements and rain gardens, enhances urban drainage systems by naturally managing stormwater and reducing runoff, promoting ecological balance.
